output.final_deliverable:
## (1) Exact H1 text from https://example.com
- **H1:** `Example Domain`
  - Evidence (verbatim from https://example.com): "Example Domain" (appears as the page’s heading text in the retrieved content) https://example.com

## (2) Exact domain of the external link from https://example.com
- example.com contains a single external link: `https://iana.org/domains/example` (shown in the visit results’ extracted links).
- **External-link domain:** `iana.org`
  - Evidence (verbatim from https://example.com retrieved content showing the link text): "Learn more" https://example.com
  - Evidence (from the extracted link target found on https://example.com during the visit): `https://iana.org/domains/example` https://example.com

## (3) One URL citation for each visited page
- https://example.com
  - Evidence (verbatim): "This domain is for use in documentation examples without needing permission. Avoid use in operations." https://example.com
- https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved
  - Evidence (verbatim): "IANA-managed Reserved Domains" https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved
- (Additionally visited during execution) https://iana.org/domains/example
  - Evidence (verbatim): "Example Domains" and "Last revised 2017-05-13." https://iana.org/domains/example
output.action_summary: H1 on example.com is “Example Domain”. The only external link on example.com points to https://iana.org/domains/example, so the external link’s domain is iana.org. Citations: https://example.com and https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved (plus https://iana.org/domains/example was also visited).

IANA-managed Reserved Domains
Certain domains are set aside, and nominally registered to “IANA”, for specific
		policy or technical purposes.
Example domains
As described in
RFC 2606
and
RFC 6761
,
	a number of domains such as
example.com
and
example.org
are maintained for documentation purposes. These domains may be used as illustrative
	examples in documents without prior coordination with us. They are 
	not available for registration or transfer.

.info
domains. These domains are available for release

merged_results.title: Visit the external link found on example.com (IANA example-domain page) to verify the external domain and gather a citation (helps cross-check the outbound link)

result.content:
Example Domains
As described in
RFC 2606
and
RFC 6761
, a
number of domains such as example.com and example.org are maintained
for documentation purposes. These domains may be used as illustrative
examples in documents without prior coordination with us. They are not
available for registration or transfer.
We provide a web service on the example domain hosts to provide basic
information on the purpose of the domain. These web services are
provided as best effort, but are not designed to support production
applications. While incidental traffic for incorrectly configured
applications is expected, please do not design applications that require
the example domains to have operating HTTP service.
Further Reading
IANA-managed Reserved Domains
Last revised 2017-05-13.

As described in

applications is expected, please do not design applications that require
the example domains to have operating HTTP service.
Further Reading
IANA-managed Reserved Domains
Last revised 2017-05-13.

and

, a
number of domains such as example.com and example.org are maintained

details.original_goal: Visit https://example.com and https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved. Return: (1) the exact H1 text from example.com, (2) the exact domain of the external link from example.com, and (3) one URL citation for each visited page.
details.goal_evaluation: The original goal required (1) exact H1 from example.com, (2) exact domain of the external link from example.com, and (3) one URL citation for each visited page (example.com and iana.org/domains/reserved). The merged results include the H1 "Example Domain", the external link domain "iana.org" from the discovered link https://iana.org/domains/example, and source URLs for both required pages: https://example.com and https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved. Therefore the objective is fully met.

synthesized.summary: Visited https://example.com and https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved, and also opened the outbound link from example.com to cross-check it. All requested deliverables are supported directly by the captured page content/links.
